calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This cause comeson regularly for Trial de Novo.
All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Appearances:
John A. Burke, counsel for Valiant Glass
Jackie Lopez, agent for Trinity Managment Services. Defendant/Appellant
Paul Mason, on behalf of himself

Counsel for Valiant Glass informs the Court that they have reached a settlement with Paul Mason, however Trinity Management Services has not. The Court will allow all parties to meet and confer to try to arrange a full settlement agreement prior to appearing on July 15, 2013 in Department 206 at 9:00am

This matter is adjourned and continued to July 15, 2013 at 9:00am in Department 206.
Judge: A.Bouliane; Clerk: R. Goulding
